channel.title: Hello, I'm Jae
channel.description: Recent content on Hello, I'm Jae

item.title: Computer Graphics (CMU 15-462/662)
item.description: Textbook Fundamentals of Computer Graphics - 5th edition (Peter Shirley, Steve Marschner, and so on) Youtube Playlist https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PL9_jI1bdZmz2emSh0UQ5iOdT2xRHFHL7E Course Link http://15462.courses.cs.cmu.edu/spring2022/ Assignment Assignment 0.0 Assignment 0.5 Assignment 1.0 Assignment 2.0 Assignment 3.0 Assignment 4.0 Outline Course Introduction Math Review Part I (Linear Algebra) Math Review Part II (Vector Calculus) Drawing a Triangle [] Coordinate Spaces and Transformations [] 3D Rotations and Complex Representations [] Perspective Projection and Texture Mapping [] Depth and Transparency [] Intro to Geometry [] Midterm Review / Local Operations on Manifolds [] Geometry Processing [] Geometric Queries [] Spatial Data Structures [] Color / Radiometry [] The Rendering Equation [] A3 PathTracer Specifics [] Numerical Integration [] Monte Carlo Ray Tracing [] Variance Reduction [] More Variance Reduction [] Introduction to Animation [] Dynamics and Time Integration [] Introduction to Optimization [] Physically-Based Animation and PDEs

item.title: Selection Tool in Maya
item.description: I’ve been working on the selection tool which can select objects by an proxy object. The proxy can be a cube or sphere, and same logic is implemented to the camera distance selection as well. The main concept came from a blog post about frustum culling. It refers something like basic collision logic. To do this, I needed normal vector and a point for each planes. Every objects in the scene will be checked if the farthest bbox point is on the same direction of plane normal or not.

item.title: Hi, my name is Jae.
item.description: Hi, my name is Jae. I’m working as a Lighting TD at ICON Creative Studio, Vancouver, Canada. I have worked on 3D Animation industry for about 4 years. My career was started as lighter and compositor and then kept moving to the technical side step by step. I like learning and digging something new. My interests are shading, rendering and cutting-edge real time related technology. For better understanding on them, I’m taking CS courses as part time student.
